StepAction: Turn dispatcher calls stream_responses_websocket; check if cached WS connection exists
build_websocket_headers + connect_async_tls_with_config; on UPGRADE_REQUIRED status fall back to HTTP SSE (Ch07)
build_ws_client_metadata composes 2-5 key map; response_create_client_metadata may add W3C traceparent/tracestate
prepare_websocket_request: try delta-mode via get_incremental_items; fall back to full-mode if last_response missing / empty / non-extension
Serialize ResponsesWsRequest::ResponseCreate(payload) and send as WS Text frame
run_websocket_response_stream loop: receive WS frame → parse ResponsesStreamEvent → process_responses_event → emit ResponseEvent via mpsc (capacity 1600)
Caller may call send_response_processed(response_id); emit ResponsesWsRequest::ResponseProcessed { response_id } as WS Text
Idle timeout / graceful WS close — return cleanly; connection may be cached for reuse
Turn complete; ResponseStream drained; WS connection cached on Drop for next turn (sticky routing via x-codex-turn-state)
Transport / handshake error — reset_websocket_session; propagate ApiError; possibly fallback to HTTP SSE (Ch07)
